task_completion.description: A native Quote block is added to the 'Service Interruption Notice' post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress editor for 'Service Interruption Notice' (or on the live site), a Quote block is visible containing the text 'Our servers will be down for maintenance on Sunday.' Look for the quote visual styling (e.g., a vertical line on the left or large quotation marks).

task_completion.description: The legacy alert shortcode is completely removed from the 'Service Interruption Notice' post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '[legacy_alert]' and '[/legacy_alert]' is nowhere to be seen in the editor or the live view of the post.

task_completion.description: A native YouTube Embed block is added to the 'Watch our latest webinar' post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress editor for 'Watch our latest webinar' (or on the live site), a YouTube embed block is visible, showing either the embedded video player for the video ID 'jNQXAC9IVRw' or the embed URL.

task_completion.description: The legacy video shortcode is completely removed from the 'Watch our latest webinar' post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '[legacy_video id="jNQXAC9IVRw"]' is nowhere to be seen in the editor or the live view of the post.

task_completion.description: A native Buttons block is added to the 'Annual Report 2025' post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress editor for 'Annual Report 2025' (or on the live site), a Button block is visible with the text 'Download Report'. If the button is selected in the editor, the link '/annual-report-pdf' should be visible in the link popover.

task_completion.description: The legacy button shortcode is completely removed from the 'Annual Report 2025' post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '[legacy_button url="/annual-report-pdf" label="Download Report"]' is nowhere to be seen in the editor or the live view of the post.

task_completion.description: All three posts have been updated and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Post updated' toast notification in the bottom left of the WordPress editor, the 'Update' button being greyed out (indicating no unsaved changes), or the final changes being visible on the live frontend of the website.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress admin GUI to edit the posts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress Gutenberg editor interface being used, rather than terminal commands (like WP-CLI) or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent inserted actual Gutenberg blocks rather than typing plain text or raw HTML.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the block UI controls (toolbar above the block, block settings in the right sidebar) indicating genuine Quote, Embed, and Button blocks were used, rather than a Custom HTML block or plain paragraph text.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter the post titles or delete the posts entirely.
integrity.visual_evidence: The post titles 'Service Interruption Notice', 'Watch our latest webinar', and 'Annual Report 2025' should remain intact in the editor or post list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Post 1: 'Service Interruption Notice'. Expected text in Quote block: 'Our servers will be down for maintenance on Sunday.' Post 2: 'Watch our latest webinar'. Expected YouTube video ID: 'jNQXAC9IVRw' (URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jNQXAC9IVRw). Post 3: 'Annual Report 2025'. Expected Button text: 'Download Report', Expected Button URL: '/annual-report-pdf'.
